---
title: "Core Competency Tags"
---

This page--at time of writing--is not rendered in the website. However, it is a useful **place from which to copy/paste core competency tags as new pages are added.** This should cut down on the number of typos in competency tags which, in turn, makes trainings under particular competencies more findable in the catalog.

## Value Tags

"<span style='color:#0096c7'>Embrace Vulnerability</span>"
"<span style='color:#0096c7'>Empathize</span>"
"<span style='color:#0096c7'>Exercise Creative Courage</span>"
"<span style='color:#0096c7'>Practice Entrepreneurialism</span>"
"<span style='color:#0096c7'>Take Action to Learn</span>"
"<span style='color:#0096c7'>Work with Adaptability</span>"

## Skill Tags

"<span style='color:#ff9500'>Bring Vision to Life</span>"
"<span style='color:#ff9500'>Candid Communication</span>"
"<span style='color:#ff9500'>Distributed Leadership</span>"
"<span style='color:#ff9500'>Progressive Technology</span>"
"<span style='color:#ff9500'>Systems Thinking & Synthesis</span>"

## Stewardship Tags

"<span style='color:#55a630'>Active Listening</span>"
"<span style='color:#55a630'>Build Capacity in Others</span>"
"<span style='color:#55a630'>Embrace Complexity</span>"
"<span style='color:#55a630'>Move at the Speed of Trust</span>"
"<span style='color:#55a630'>Work to Transform Power</span>"

## Results Tags

"<span style='color:#7b2cbf'>Achieve Progress Towards Goals Mission and Vision</span>"
"<span style='color:#7b2cbf'>Deliver High Quality Results</span>"
"<span style='color:#7b2cbf'>Drive Cycles of Continuous Improvement and Evolution</span>"
"<span style='color:#7b2cbf'>Ensure Belonging Access and Opportunity</span>"
"<span style='color:#7b2cbf'>Tell the Story</span>"
